## Appendix G Vibration Fixture Simulation (Jin Guang)

**Bolt Torque Calculation:**  
T \= K\*D\*F  (K=Torque Coefficient, D=Diameter, F=Clamping Force)  
T=0.2\*0.006m\*2183.5N  
Torque \= 2.62Nm per bolt to ensure even force of 2183.5N across rail.

![][image1]![][image2]  
*Fig G-1 SpaceX PSD Values*  
![][image3]  
![][image4]  
*Fig G-2 Ansys Random Vibration Results (1-sigma)*
